// Engagement

Underperforming sponsors

Below the Fund and MIR 2025 scorecard averages — flagged for FY2026 engagement.

SponsorIdentified riskMitigation measure
Sponsor ENo formal Net Zero policy; energy-data coverage at 37% of portfolio, below the MIR average of 60%.Q4 2025 engagement to formalize an energy-data collection SLA and set a Net Zero target year.
Sponsor DNet Zero policy still in progress with no committed date; GRESB not yet rated after two reporting cycles.Requested a GRESB submission commitment and a Net Zero target date by the FY2026 review.
